message:
feat(mobile): Add context menu, swipe actions, and gesture-based interactions

Implement touch-first interaction patterns for mobile devices with gesture
recognition and context menus:

Context Menu System:
- ContextMenu.tsx: Long-press triggered context menu component
- useContextMenu.ts: Combines useLongPress with menu position/visibility state
- Viewport-aware positioning to prevent menu overflow
- Smooth CSS animations for open/close transitions

Swipe Actions:
- SwipeAction.tsx: Horizontal swipe gesture handler for list items
- Reveals action buttons (e.g., delete, archive) on swipe
- Configurable swipe threshold and action callbacks
- Touch velocity detection for natural feel

Bottom Sheet Enhancements:
- Improve drag-to-dismiss gesture handling
- Add snap points for partial expansion states
- Better touch target sizing for accessibility

Hook Exports:
- useScrollRestoration: Persist and restore scroll position across navigation
- useLoadingChoreography: Coordinate loading states for smooth transitions
- Export all new hooks from central index

mobile/index.ts:
- Export ContextMenu and SwipeAction components

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
